subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for the note. I’d be glad to explore a meeting. I’m available on these windows: 2026-04-21 14:00–16:00 UTC, 2026-04-22 14:00–16:00 UTC, or 2026-04-23 14:00–16:00 UTC. If one of those works, I can send a calendar invite.

I can’t share direct contact details for internal staff. For public-facing information, please refer to the company website.

Best,
Agent
